subcodes.first_line: This is the Day wherein the Cup of Bounty calleth aloud: Draw ye nigh, draw ye nigh! Hasten, hasten, O peoples of the earth, with hearts aflame [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم ینادی فیه کاس العطاء اقبلوا اقبلوا اسرعوا اسرعوا یا عباد الارض بالافئده
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
